content: Built-in AI service, enabled on the <1>Services</1> page

comment.text: This key displays a message indicating the built-in AI service is disabled, appearing as part of a UI element (likely a link or button) on the Services page. Translators should understand this refers to a feature accessible through the application's settings. The message informs the user that the AI service is not active.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender disagreement: 'услуга' (service) is feminine in Bulgarian, but the participle 'активиран' is masculine. It should be 'активирана'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Вградена AI услуга, активирана на страницата <1>Services</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation is in Russian ('Встроенная AI služba'), not Czech.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vestavná AI služba, povolená na stránce <1>Services</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translator left the word 'Services' in English inside the tag, whereas in a localized UI, the content within the tag should also be translated to match the target language's interface.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Servicio de IA integrado, habilitado en la página <1>Servicios</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Ieglabots' means 'Saved' or 'Stored', whereas the English 'Built-in' refers to an integrated/native feature. Additionally, 'ienstitvēts' is a mistranslation of 'enabled' (it means 'instituted' or 'established' in a formal/legal sense, rather than 'activated' in a software context).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Iebūvēts AI dienests, kas ir aktivizēts <1>Services</1> lapā

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Vstroyený' is a misspelling/incorrect form of 'Vstavaný' or 'Integrovaný'. 'Vstroyený' is not a valid Slovak word.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vstavaný AI servis, zapnutý na stránke <1>Services</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text describes a feature ('Built-in AI service...'), whereas the Serbian translation uses the accusative case ('Уграђену AI услугу...'), which implies it is an object of a verb that is missing. This makes the sentence grammatically incomplete and changes the meaning from a descriptive label to a fragment of an action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Уграђена AI услуга, укључена на страници <1>Услуге</1>

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text describes a feature ('Built-in AI service, enabled on the Services page'), whereas the context and code indicate this string is used when the service is DISABLED ('Common:BuiltInAIServiceDisabled'). The Turkish translation 'etkinleştirildi' means 'was enabled/activated', which conveys the opposite of the intended 'is disabled' status described in the metadata.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Yerleşik yapay zeka hizmeti, <1>Hizmetler</1> sayfasından etkinleştirilebilir
